prompt_summary: Read-only review of LFA-P6 for API route behavior drift, workflow writeback/projection semantics, route context propagation, API route contract coverage, manifest honesty, and large-file anti-abuse compliance.

non_blocking_findings.summary: API route contract source lists are duplicated between the checker and test, creating a maintenance trap for future route-module additions.
The API route contract extractor self-check uses lower-bound route counts rather than exact route counts, so a future missed module could be masked if total count remains above the floor.
The auto-advance projection refresh catches all projectionById errors and falls back to workbenchProjection, which preserves current behavior but can mask future projection refresh bugs.
Plan review route still manually expands workflowStateWithProjectStatus-style fields; unifying this later could reduce drift risk.

local_evidence_at_review_time: npm run check:large-files passed with no issues and no warnings after splitting requirement services below 300 lines.
